overview.description: AI-powered communication automation (voice bots, chat bots, email bots) and B2B communication agency
overview.description_long: EverConn.AI s.r.o. is a Czech communication and events agency that combines AI automation with traditional PR/marketing services. Their AI products include a Voice-bot capable of handling 6,000 calls per hour in any language (used for debt reminders, lead generation, appointment reminders, upsell campaigns), an Email-bot using NLP to auto-triage and respond to inbound emails, a Chat-bot for customer service, and a Grow-bot for outbound lead management. They also offer event organisation, content creation, PR and media audit services. Clients include Kooperativa (insurance) and T-Mobile for debt collection calling campaigns.
overview.tagline: Vaše komunikace. Naše mise (Your communication. Our mission)

history.origin_story: Originally registered as SnowmanCRAFTS s.r.o. in February 2020 in Brno. Rebranded and pivoted to AI-powered communication services as EverConn.AI s.r.o. in June 2022, relocating headquarters to Prague.

key_milestones.event: Founded as SnowmanCRAFTS s.r.o. in Brno
Rebranded to EverConn.AI s.r.o. and relocated to Prague (Staré Město)
Active with clients including Kooperativa and T-Mobile

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: EverConn.AI primarily resells and integrates commodity AI voice/chat/NLP APIs rather than building proprietary models. As foundation model providers (OpenAI, Google, AWS) continue to commoditize voice, chat and email automation, the differentiation of a small integration-focused agency erodes quickly.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: AI voice-bot and automation services is a real and growing market with demonstrated Czech enterprise clients (Kooperativa, T-Mobile). However, it is dominated by larger platforms and the combined communication-agency+AI model creates a fragmented value proposition.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: No known external funding. Small team with no runway signals in public sources. Bootstrapped small agency model with limited ability to scale or weather competitive pressure from well-funded AI automation platforms.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Small bootstrapped startup with no proprietary AI technology, relying on commodity voice/chat AI integration. High likelihood of commoditization by platform providers and no known funding safety net.

metadata.notes: Company originally registered as SnowmanCRAFTS s.r.o. (IČO: 08900418) in Brno in Feb 2020, rebranded to EverConn.AI s.r.o. in June 2022 with move to Prague. Director: Ing. Patrik Juránek. Address: Rybná 716/24, 110 00 Praha 1 - Staré Město.
